---
name: Documentation boundary question
about: Ask whether public wording crosses the disclosure boundary
title: "[boundary] "
labels: documentation,boundary
assignees: ""
---

## Public wording in question

Link or quote the public wording that may need review.

## Concern

Explain whether the wording may:

- overstate public runtime maturity
- imply private proof is public
- expose deployment mechanics
- blur public, withheld, staged, planned, or not-implemented status

## Suggested public-safe adjustment

Propose a safer wording if available.

Do not include private runtime details, keys, paths, hostnames, topology, proof artifacts, hashes, or deployment commands.
